mapper.select: select * from sys_artbot_model where status = '0' order by is_default desc, model_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_artbot_model(model_name, base_url, api_key, model_code, status, is_default, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{modelName}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{modelCode}, #{status}, #{isDefault}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{systemPrompt}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sys_artbot_model set is_default = '0' where model_id != #{excludeModelId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_artbot_conversation where model_id = #{modelId}

select c.*, m.model_name, m.model_code from sys_artbot_conversation c inner join sys_artbot_model m on m.model_id = c.model_id where c.user_id = #{userId} order by c.update_time desc, c.conversation_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_artbot_conversation(user_id, model_id, title, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{modelId}, #{title}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update sys_artbot_conversation set title = #{title}, update_time = sysdate() where conversation_id = #{conversationId}
update sys_artbot_conversation set update_time = sysdate() where conversation_id = #{conversationId}
mapper.delete: delete from sys_artbot_conversation where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select * from sys_artbot_message where conversation_id = #{conversationId} order by message_id
select * from (select * from sys_artbot_message where conversation_id = #{conversationId} order by message_id desc limit #{limit}) recent order by message_id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_artbot_message(conversation_id, role, content, create_time) values(#{conversationId}, #{role}, #{content}, sysdate())
